debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let A := fderiv ℝ F 0
  let f := A.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use InnerProductSpace.riesz.symm f
  intro v
  rw [inner_comm, ← InnerProductSpace.riesz_apply, LinearIsometryEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
  have hf : f v = A (v, 1) - A (0, 1) := by rw [← A.map_sub]; simp
  rw [hf, ← hF 0 v 0, ← hF 0 0 0, hδL0, sub_zero]

obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  let f := L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ _).symm f
  intro v
  rw [InnerProductSpace.toDual_symm_apply, ← hδL0, hF 0 0 0, hF 0 v 0, ← L.map_add]
  congr; ext <;> simp

obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let L := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).surjective L
  use g
  intro v
  rw [hF 0 v 0]
  have h0 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← hF 0 0 0, hδL0]
  have h1 : (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) := by simp
  rw [h1, map_add, h0, add_zero]
  simp [L, ← hg, InnerProductSpace.toDual_apply]

obtain ⟨F, _, hF⟩ := h
  let f := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := (f.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ _ _)).exists_inner_product
  use g; intro v
  rw [hF 0 v 0, (by simp : (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1)), f.map_add, hg, ← hF 0 0 0, hδL0, add_zero]

rcases h with ⟨F, hF, hF'⟩
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  have hL : ∀ v, δL v = L (v, 0) := fun v => by
    rw [hF' 0 v 0, ← hF' 0 0 0, hδL0, add_zero, ← L.map_sub, Prod.mk_sub_sub, sub_zero, sub_self]
  let f : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ :=
  { toFun := δL,
    map_add' := fun x y => by rw [hL, hL, hL, ← L.map_add, Prod.mk_add_add, add_zero],
    map_smul' := fun c x => by rw [hL, hL, ← L.map_smul, Prod.smul_mk, smul_zero] }
  let b := EuclideanSpace.basisFun (Fin n) ℝ
  use ∑ i, f (b i) • b i
  intro v
  simp [inner_sum_left, inner_smul_left, OrthonormalBasis.repr_apply_apply, conj_eq_id,
    ← f.map_smul, ← f.map_sum, OrthonormalBasis.sum_repr, mul_comm]

obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)

end Lagrangian

end ClassicalMechanics

obtain ⟨F, _, hF⟩ := h
  let A := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  let f : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →ₗ[ℝ] ℝ := A.toLinearMap.comp (LinearMap.inl ℝ _ _)
  have h1 : ∀ v, δL v = f v := fun v ↦ by
    have : (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) := by simp
    rw [hF 0 v 0, this, map_add, (hF 0 0 0).symm, hδL0, add_zero]; rfl
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := f.exists_inner_vec
  exact ⟨g, fun v ↦ (h1 v).trans (hg v)⟩

obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let L := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ _).symm L
  intro v
  have h1 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := hF 0 0 0 ▸ hδL0
  rw [InnerProductSpace.toDual_symm_apply L v, hF 0 v 0, ← (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_add]
  simp [L, h1]

obtain ⟨F, _, hF⟩ := h
  let A := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  let f := A.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := (toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).surjective f
  use g
  intro v
  rw [hF 0 v 0, show (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) from rfl, A.map_add, ← hF 0 0 0, hδL0, add_zero, ← hg]
  rfl

end Lagrangian

end ClassicalMechanics

obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let f := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).surjective f
  use g
  intro v
  rw [hF 0 v 0, show (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by simp, map_add]
  have h0 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← hF 0 0 0, hδL0]
  rw [h0, add_zero, ← hg]
  rfl

rcases h with ⟨F, -, hL⟩
  let L' := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (toDual ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n))).symm L'
  intro v
  have h0 : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← hL 0 0 0, hδL0]
  have h1 : (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) := by simp
  rw [toDual_symm_apply, ← hL 0 v 0, h1, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add, h0, add_zero]

rcases h with ⟨F, -, hF⟩
  let f := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := f.exists_inner_left
  use g
  intro v
  simp [← hg, ← hF, hδL0, ← (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).map_sub, ContinuousLinearMap.inl_apply]

obtain ⟨F, -, hF⟩ := h
  let f := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use f.innerProductRepr
  intro v
  rw [hF 0 v 0, ← f.innerProductRepr_apply v, f]
  have : fderiv ℝ F (0, 0) (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← hF 0 0 0, hδL0]
  simp [← map_add, this]

obtain ⟨F, _, hD⟩ := h
  let L := (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)).comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)) ℝ)
  use (InnerProductSpace.riesz ℝ _).symm L
  intro v
  have : δL v = L v + δL 0 := by
    rw [hD 0 v 0, hD 0 0 0, ← map_add, Prod.mk_add_mk, add_zero, zero_add]
  rw [this, hδL0, add_zero, InnerProductSpace.riesz_symm_apply]
